TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == 13 ci Wi-lyen Wi-lyen-1-se "kamu nu ku Now-man, Williame i kamu nu Ba, Guillaume In kamu nu ing, William I, 1028 a mihcaan-1087 a mihca 9 a bulad 9 a demiad", pangangan han tu midemecay Wi-lyenan "William the Conqueror", i ayaway nipangangan u bucud a wawa ci Wi-lyen "William the Bastard" u saayaway nu Now-man Ing-ke-lan hungti, ciniza makay 1066 a mihcaan malingatu mikuwan tu Ing-ke-lan, katukuh 1087 a mihcaan kapatayan pahezek. :Williame IÔľõś≥ēŤ™ě:Guillaume IÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:William IÔľõ1028ŚĻī‚ÄĒ1087ŚĻī9śúą9śó•), . sa ni Wi-cin nu mialaway a iluc ni Low-low, makay 1035 a mihcaan malingatu mala Ba-kow Now-man-ti-kow-cye Ci-syaw-mu 2 se "Guillaume II". Wi-lyen u tahazikuz cayay ka siacawaay Now-man-ti-kow-cye Low-pey-1-se atu sasumidang ci Ay-al-lye-wa a wawa. Wi-lyen macaliway matenes ku pisaicalang patizeng tu nu uzipay a kasitungus, katukuh tu 1060 a mihcaan, tanektek tu ciniza i Now-man-ti amikuwan,1066 a mihcaan, Wi-lyen milunguc mala uhungti nu Ing-ke-lan. (Guillaume II). . ciniza tu caca nu sakaput a hitay Now-man tademaw, Pu-lye-ta-ni tademaw, Bow-lan-mang tademaw nu binawlan a nisakaputan nu Ba-lan-si masakaputay a hitay midebung tu Ing-ke-lan, i Hey-s-tun-s a pilalaisan makademec ci Ha-low-te-2-se nu Ing-kow a hitay, kilul misawacu' tu Ing-kow a milais, uyni sa nu Now-man a tademaw midemec tu Ing-ke-lan, singangan ciniza tu "midemecay ci Wi-lyenan". Wi-lyen sazikuzay a nikauzip tanekten ku pikwan i Ing-kow, atu mahulak ku sakakaay a wawa ni Low-pey-al-2-se a sikalibitan cinizaan. lalangawan nu Now-Man-Ba-la-si patayzaen niza i Ing-ke-lan, sakay zikuzayay nu Ing-ke-lan se-ci a mihcaan mapaliliday. maliliday pasu mikuwanay masumad, sakay masumad ku kamu nu Ing, syakay atu kiwkayay nu sakakaay a nikasumad, asaca miyung tu zuma nu Talu takiwkay masumad ku nizateng. maliliday a mahapinang atu pinaaytu a mihcaan masakamu nu migingkiway. ŚďąśīõŚĺ∑ÁéčŤĘęśģļ tu walu se-ci nu sazikuzay, S-kan-ti-na-wi-ya a tademaw malingatu tu milais zikuz pangangan tu Now-ma-ti a kitizaan. 911 a mihcaan, cacay mikeliday nu kukung ci Low-low malecad tu ba-wang Ca-li-3-se matatelekay, Ba-wang nilekakawaan ni Now-ma-ti-pow-kow pabeli ci Low-low, S-kan-ti-na-ya a tademaw namakayni ci Now-man-ti tiza tu mana'nel. Lu-ang liwliway a lala' zikuz mala angangan nu Now-ma-ti-kong-kow. cacay lasubu a mihcaan tu Ing-ke-lan sazikuz, S-kan-ti-na-wi-ya a tademaw hakay ci Now-ma-ti usapilais tu aenenga nu Ing-kow, mahiza la'cus tu ku kacacayat nu Ing-ke-lan atu Now-ma-ti. amisakapah tu kacacayat, Ing-ke-lan a hungti pisabalucu' tu Ay-say-al-lye-te i 1002 a mihcaan siacawa tu ci Now-man-ti-kung-cye-Li-ca-2 se a sabana Ay-ma mala u sakatusa a acawaw. Tan-may lalid a mibahal sa milais tu Ing-ke-lan, 1013 a mihcaan, Tan-may a hungti ci S-win-1-se mibahbah ci Ay-say-al-liye-te atu luma'ay nuhini papiliyas tu Ing-ke-lan, Ay-say-al-liye-te pasaayza ci Li-sya-alan milunguc a papiedap, tayza milimek ni Now-ma-ti. Ci-S-wen sakatusa a mihcaan mapatay, Ay-say-al-liye-te mapasulul taluma', nika S-wenay a wawa ci Ke-nu-te sakay taluma' ni Ay-say-al-liye-te patahkal tu zumaay a sasakamuan. Ay-say-al-liye-te i 1016 a mihcaan bahal mapatay zikuz, ci Ke-nu-te mala hungti tu nu Ing-ke-lan. ci Ay-ma mala sakatusa tu ni Ke-nu-te tu a acawa, ciniza atu ci Ay-say-al-lye-te a tatusaay a wawa ci ma mala ci Ay-te-hwa atu A-bow-lye milakalak i Now-man-ti. Ke-nu-te i 1035 a mihcaan mapatay, ciniza atu saayaway a acawa a nilecuhan a wawa ci Ye-tu-tuy-ha-low-te ku micaluk tu Ing-ke-lan a hungti, ciniza aci Ay-ma a nilecahan a wawa ci Ha-te-ke-nu-te ku micalukay tu Tan-may a hungti, mala Tan-may a hungti ci Ke-nu-te 3 se. u Ing-ke-lan caay ka tanektek. 1036 a mkihcaan, A-bow-lye panukas taluma' i Ing-kow mizizaw tu ina, hakay pazayza Ha-low-te hungti a situngus patahkal amilais. uyni a kungku paheci ci A-bow-lyean zikuz mapatay ci Wi-say-ke-s-pow-cye Ke-te-wen tuway, nika zuma a kungku uyni a kawaw pakayzaay ci Ha-low-tean. namahiza ci Ay-ma milakalak i Ba-lan-te-s, katukuh Ha-te-ke-nu-te i Ha-low-te tu 1040 a mihcaan mapatay zikuz mala hungti tu nu Ing-ke-lan, Ha-te-ke-nu-te u lecad a wina padek a wama a kakama ci Ay-te-hwa mikilul tu padek a sabama tayza tu i Ing-ke-lan. Ay-te-hwa i sabama ci Ha-te-ke-nu-te i 1042 a mihca 6 a bulad mapatay zikuz musakamu malahungti. Wi-lyen i 1027 a mihcaan anucaay 1028 a mihcaan lecuh i Now-ma-ti-ba-lay-s, u pilecuhan a demiad niza hakay macapi tu 1028 a mihcaan tu zikuz nu mihcaan, ciniza tataytayay a wawa ni Now-man-tikung-cye Low-pay-al-1-se, u baki aca ni Now-man-ti-kung-cye-li-sya-2-se. u ina niza ci Ay-al-lye-wa u nu Ba-lay-say Bu-al-pey a tatayna a wawaan, Bu-al-pey hakay u singanganay tu misannga'ay bukul a kuli anucaay mipasapayuay tu cayay ka muni' a kudih. Ś®ĀŚĽČŚú®1027ŚĻīśąĖ1028 .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ** ¶i wi-r~…ĺj…ôn wi-r~…ĺj…ôn-*-s…ô "kamu nu ku now-man, wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam…ô i kamu nu ba, guir~…ĺr~…ĺaum…ô in kamu nu iŇč, wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam i, **** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad", paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu mid…ôm…ô ¶aj wi-r~…ĺj…ônan "wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam tńß…ô ¶on*u…ôror", i ajawaj nipaŇčaŇčan u bu ¶ud a wawa ¶i wi-r~…ĺj…ôn "wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam tńß…ô bastard" u saajawaj nu now-man iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan ńßuŇčti, ¶iniza makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikuwan tu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan kapatajan pańß…ôz…ôk. :wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam…ô i***:guir~…ĺr~…ĺaum…ô i***:wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam i****************), . sa ni wi- ¶in nu miar~…ĺawaj a ir~…ĺu ¶ ni r~…ĺow-r~…ĺow, makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺa ba-kow now-man-ti-kow- ¶j…ô ¶i-sjaw-mu * s…ô "guir~…ĺr~…ĺaum…ô ii". wi-r~…ĺj…ôn u tańßazikuz ¶ajaj ka sia ¶awaaj now-man-ti-kow- ¶j…ô r~…ĺow-p…ô-*-s…ô atu sasumidaŇč ¶i aj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺj…ô-wa a wawa. wi-r~…ĺj…ôn ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj mat…ôn…ôs ku pisai ¶ar~…ĺaŇč patiz…ôŇč tu nu uzipaj a kasituŇčus, katukuńß tu **** a mińß ¶aan, tan…ôkt…ôk tu ¶iniza i now-man-ti amikuwan,**** a mińß ¶aan, wi-r~…ĺj…ôn mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ mar~…ĺa uńßuŇčti nu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan. (guir~…ĺr~…ĺaum…ô ii). . ¶iniza tu ¶a ¶a nu sakaput a ńßitaj now-man tad…ômaw, pu-r~…ĺj…ô-ta-ni tad…ômaw, bow-r~…ĺan-maŇč tad…ômaw nu binawr~…ĺan a nisakaputan nu ba-r~…ĺan-si masakaputaj a ńßitaj mid…ôbuŇč tu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan, i ńß…ô-s-tun-s a pir~…ĺar~…ĺaisan makad…ôm…ô ¶ ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺow-t…ô-*-s…ô nu iŇč-kow a ńßitaj, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ misawa ¶u Ē~ ° tu iŇč-kow a mir~…ĺais, ujni sa nu now-man a tad…ômaw mid…ôm…ô ¶ tu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan, siŇčaŇčan ¶iniza tu "mid…ôm…ô ¶aj ¶i wi-r~…ĺj…ônan". wi-r~…ĺj…ôn sazikuzaj a nikauzip tan…ôkt…ôn ku pikwan i iŇč-kow, atu mańßur~…ĺak ku sakakaaj a wawa ni r~…ĺow-p…ô-ar~…ĺ-*-s…ô a sikar~…ĺibitan ¶inizaan. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu now-man-ba-r~…ĺa-si patajza…ôn niza i iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan, sakaj zikuzajaj nu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan s…ô- ¶i a mińß ¶aan mapar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj. mar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj pasu mikuwanaj masumad, sakaj masumad ku kamu nu iŇč, sjakaj atu kiwkajaj nu sakakaaj a nikasumad, asa ¶a mijuŇč tu zuma nu tar~…ĺu takiwkaj masumad ku nizat…ôŇč. mar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a mańßapinaŇč atu pinaajtu a mińß ¶aan masakamu nu migiŇčkiwaj. ****** tu war~…ĺu s…ô- ¶i nu sazikuzaj, s-kan-ti-na-wi-ja a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mir~…ĺais zikuz paŇčaŇčan tu now-ma-ti a kitizaan. *** a mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶aj mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu kukuŇč ¶i r~…ĺow-r~…ĺow mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ba-waŇč ¶a-r~…ĺi-*-s…ô matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj, ba-waŇč nir~…ĺ…ôkakawaan ni now-ma-ti-pow-kow pab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i r~…ĺow-r~…ĺow, s-kan-ti-na-ja a tad…ômaw namakajni ¶i now-man-ti tiza tu mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ. r~…ĺu-aŇč r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° zikuz mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nu now-ma-ti-koŇč-kow. ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan tu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan sazikuz, s-kan-ti-na-wi-ja a tad…ômaw ńßakaj ¶i now-ma-ti usapir~…ĺais tu a…ôn…ôŇča nu iŇč-kow, mańßiza r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu ku ka ¶a ¶ajat nu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan atu now-ma-ti. amisakapańß tu ka ¶a ¶ajat, iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan a ńßuŇčti pisabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu aj-saj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺj…ô-t…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan sia ¶awa tu ¶i now-man-ti-kuŇč- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi- ¶a-* s…ô a sabana aj-ma mar~…ĺa u sakatusa a a ¶awaw. tan-maj r~…ĺar~…ĺid a mibańßar~…ĺ sa mir~…ĺais tu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan, **** a mińß ¶aan, tan-maj a ńßuŇčti ¶i s-win-*-s…ô mibańßbańß ¶i aj-saj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺij…ô-t…ô atu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj nuńßini papir~…ĺijas tu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan, aj-saj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺij…ô-t…ô pasaajza ¶i r~…ĺi-sja-ar~…ĺan mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ a papi…ôdap, tajza mir~…ĺim…ôk ni now-ma-ti. ¶i-s-w…ôn sakatusa a mińß ¶aan mapataj, aj-saj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺij…ô-t…ô mapasur~…ĺur~…ĺ tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nika s-w…ônaj a wawa ¶i k…ô-nu-t…ô sakaj tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni aj-saj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺij…ô-t…ô patańßkar~…ĺ tu zumaaj a sasakamuan. aj-saj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺij…ô-t…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan bańßar~…ĺ mapataj zikuz, ¶i k…ô-nu-t…ô mar~…ĺa ńßuŇčti tu nu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan. ¶i aj-ma mar~…ĺa sakatusa tu ni k…ô-nu-t…ô tu a a ¶awa, ¶iniza atu ¶i aj-saj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺj…ô-t…ô a tatusaaj a wawa ¶i ma mar~…ĺa ¶i aj-t…ô-ńßwa atu a-bow-r~…ĺj…ô mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak i now-man-ti. k…ô-nu-t…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan mapataj, ¶iniza atu saajawaj a a ¶awa a nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a wawa ¶i j…ô-tu-tuj-ńßa-r~…ĺow-t…ô ku mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan a ńßuŇčti, ¶iniza a ¶i aj-ma a nir~…ĺ…ô ¶ańßan a wawa ¶i ńßa-t…ô-k…ô-nu-t…ô ku mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu tan-maj a ńßuŇčti, mar~…ĺa tan-maj a ńßuŇčti ¶i k…ô-nu-t…ô * s…ô. u iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan ¶aaj ka tan…ôkt…ôk. **** a mkińß ¶aan, a-bow-r~…ĺj…ô panukas tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i iŇč-kow mizizaw tu ina, ńßakaj pazajza ńßa-r~…ĺow-t…ô ńßuŇčti a situŇčus patańßkar~…ĺ amir~…ĺais. ujni a kuŇčku pańß…ô ¶i ¶i a-bow-r~…ĺj…ôan zikuz mapataj ¶i wi-saj-k…ô-s-pow- ¶j…ô k…ô-t…ô-w…ôn tuwaj, nika zuma a kuŇčku ujni a kawaw pakajzaaj ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺow-t…ôan. namańßiza ¶i aj-ma mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak i ba-r~…ĺan-t…ô-s, katukuńß ńßa-t…ô-k…ô-nu-t…ô i ńßa-r~…ĺow-t…ô tu **** a mińß ¶aan mapataj zikuz mar~…ĺa ńßuŇčti tu nu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan, ńßa-t…ô-k…ô-nu-t…ô u r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a wina pad…ôk a wama a kakama ¶i aj-t…ô-ńßwa mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu pad…ôk a sabama tajza tu i iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan. aj-t…ô-ńßwa i sabama ¶i ńßa-t…ô-k…ô-nu-t…ô i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mapataj zikuz musakamu mar~…ĺańßuŇčti. wi-r~…ĺj…ôn i **** a mińß ¶aan anu ¶aaj **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i now-ma-ti-ba-r~…ĺaj-s, u pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a d…ômiad niza ńßakaj ma ¶api tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu zikuz nu mińß ¶aan, ¶iniza tatajtajaj a wawa ni now-man-tikuŇč- ¶j…ô r~…ĺow-paj-ar~…ĺ-*-s…ô, u baki a ¶a ni now-man-ti-kuŇč- ¶j…ô-r~…ĺi-sja-*-s…ô. u ina niza ¶i aj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺj…ô-wa u nu ba-r~…ĺaj-saj bu-ar~…ĺ-p…ô a tatajna a wawaan, bu-ar~…ĺ-p…ô ńßakaj u siŇčaŇčanaj tu misanŇča Ē~ °aj bukur~…ĺ a kur~…ĺi anu ¶aaj mipasapajuaj tu ¶ajaj ka muni Ē~ ° a kudińß. ************* .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == 13 ci Wi-lyen Wi-lyen-1-se "kamu nu ku Now-man, Williame i kamu nu Ba, Guillaume In kamu nu ing, William I, 1028 a mihcaan-1087 a mihca 9 a bulad 9 a demiad", pangangan han tu midemecay Wi-lyenan "William the Conqueror", i ayaway nipangangan u bucud a wawa ci Wi-lyen "William the Bastard" u saayaway nu Now-man Ing-ke-lan hungti, ciniza makay 1066 a mihcaan malingatu mikuwan tu Ing-ke-lan, katukuh 1087 a mihcaan kapatayan pahezek. :Williame IÔľõś≥ēŤ™ě:Guillaume IÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:William IÔľõ1028ŚĻī‚ÄĒ1087ŚĻī9śúą9śó•), . sa ni Wi-cin nu mialaway a iluc ni Low-low, makay 1035 a mihcaan malingatu mala Ba-kow Now-man-ti-kow-cye Ci-syaw-mu 2 se "Guillaume II". Wi-lyen u tahazikuz cayay ka siacawaay Now-man-ti-kow-cye Low-pey-1-se atu sasumidang ci Ay-al-lye-wa a wawa. Wi-lyen macaliway matenes ku pisaicalang patizeng tu nu uzipay a kasitungus, katukuh tu 1060 a mihcaan, tanektek tu ciniza i Now-man-ti amikuwan,1066 a mihcaan, Wi-lyen milunguc mala uhungti nu Ing-ke-lan. (Guillaume II). . ciniza tu caca nu sakaput a hitay Now-man tademaw, Pu-lye-ta-ni tademaw, Bow-lan-mang tademaw nu binawlan a nisakaputan nu Ba-lan-si masakaputay a hitay midebung tu Ing-ke-lan, i Hey-s-tun-s a pilalaisan makademec ci Ha-low-te-2-se nu Ing-kow a hitay, kilul misawacu' tu Ing-kow a milais, uyni sa nu Now-man a tademaw midemec tu Ing-ke-lan, singangan ciniza tu "midemecay ci Wi-lyenan". Wi-lyen sazikuzay a nikauzip tanekten ku pikwan i Ing-kow, atu mahulak ku sakakaay a wawa ni Low-pey-al-2-se a sikalibitan cinizaan. lalangawan nu Now-Man-Ba-la-si patayzaen niza i Ing-ke-lan, sakay zikuzayay nu Ing-ke-lan se-ci a mihcaan mapaliliday. maliliday pasu mikuwanay masumad, sakay masumad ku kamu nu Ing, syakay atu kiwkayay nu sakakaay a nikasumad, asaca miyung tu zuma nu Talu takiwkay masumad ku nizateng. maliliday a mahapinang atu pinaaytu a mihcaan masakamu nu migingkiway. ŚďąśīõŚĺ∑ÁéčŤĘęśģļ tu walu se-ci nu sazikuzay, S-kan-ti-na-wi-ya a tademaw malingatu tu milais zikuz pangangan tu Now-ma-ti a kitizaan. 911 a mihcaan, cacay mikeliday nu kukung ci Low-low malecad tu ba-wang Ca-li-3-se matatelekay, Ba-wang nilekakawaan ni Now-ma-ti-pow-kow pabeli ci Low-low, S-kan-ti-na-ya a tademaw namakayni ci Now-man-ti tiza tu mana'nel. Lu-ang liwliway a lala' zikuz mala angangan nu Now-ma-ti-kong-kow. cacay lasubu a mihcaan tu Ing-ke-lan sazikuz, S-kan-ti-na-wi-ya a tademaw hakay ci Now-ma-ti usapilais tu aenenga nu Ing-kow, mahiza la'cus tu ku kacacayat nu Ing-ke-lan atu Now-ma-ti. amisakapah tu kacacayat, Ing-ke-lan a hungti pisabalucu' tu Ay-say-al-lye-te i 1002 a mihcaan siacawa tu ci Now-man-ti-kung-cye-Li-ca-2 se a sabana Ay-ma mala u sakatusa a acawaw. Tan-may lalid a mibahal sa milais tu Ing-ke-lan, 1013 a mihcaan, Tan-may a hungti ci S-win-1-se mibahbah ci Ay-say-al-liye-te atu luma'ay nuhini papiliyas tu Ing-ke-lan, Ay-say-al-liye-te pasaayza ci Li-sya-alan milunguc a papiedap, tayza milimek ni Now-ma-ti. Ci-S-wen sakatusa a mihcaan mapatay, Ay-say-al-liye-te mapasulul taluma', nika S-wenay a wawa ci Ke-nu-te sakay taluma' ni Ay-say-al-liye-te patahkal tu zumaay a sasakamuan. Ay-say-al-liye-te i 1016 a mihcaan bahal mapatay zikuz, ci Ke-nu-te mala hungti tu nu Ing-ke-lan. ci Ay-ma mala sakatusa tu ni Ke-nu-te tu a acawa, ciniza atu ci Ay-say-al-lye-te a tatusaay a wawa ci ma mala ci Ay-te-hwa atu A-bow-lye milakalak i Now-man-ti. Ke-nu-te i 1035 a mihcaan mapatay, ciniza atu saayaway a acawa a nilecuhan a wawa ci Ye-tu-tuy-ha-low-te ku micaluk tu Ing-ke-lan a hungti, ciniza aci Ay-ma a nilecahan a wawa ci Ha-te-ke-nu-te ku micalukay tu Tan-may a hungti, mala Tan-may a hungti ci Ke-nu-te 3 se. u Ing-ke-lan caay ka tanektek. 1036 a mkihcaan, A-bow-lye panukas taluma' i Ing-kow mizizaw tu ina, hakay pazayza Ha-low-te hungti a situngus patahkal amilais. uyni a kungku paheci ci A-bow-lyean zikuz mapatay ci Wi-say-ke-s-pow-cye Ke-te-wen tuway, nika zuma a kungku uyni a kawaw pakayzaay ci Ha-low-tean. namahiza ci Ay-ma milakalak i Ba-lan-te-s, katukuh Ha-te-ke-nu-te i Ha-low-te tu 1040 a mihcaan mapatay zikuz mala hungti tu nu Ing-ke-lan, Ha-te-ke-nu-te u lecad a wina padek a wama a kakama ci Ay-te-hwa mikilul tu padek a sabama tayza tu i Ing-ke-lan. Ay-te-hwa i sabama ci Ha-te-ke-nu-te i 1042 a mihca 6 a bulad mapatay zikuz musakamu malahungti. Wi-lyen i 1027 a mihcaan anucaay 1028 a mihcaan lecuh i Now-ma-ti-ba-lay-s, u pilecuhan a demiad niza hakay macapi tu 1028 a mihcaan tu zikuz nu mihcaan, ciniza tataytayay a wawa ni Now-man-tikung-cye Low-pay-al-1-se, u baki aca ni Now-man-ti-kung-cye-li-sya-2-se. u ina niza ci Ay-al-lye-wa u nu Ba-lay-say Bu-al-pey a tatayna a wawaan, Bu-al-pey hakay u singanganay tu misannga'ay bukul a kuli anucaay mipasapayuay tu cayay ka muni' a kudih. Ś®ĀŚĽČŚú®1027ŚĻīśąĖ1028 .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ** ¶i wi-r~…ĺj…ôn wi-r~…ĺj…ôn-*-s…ô "kamu nu ku now-man, wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam…ô i kamu nu ba, guir~…ĺr~…ĺaum…ô in kamu nu iŇč, wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam i, **** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad", paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu mid…ôm…ô ¶aj wi-r~…ĺj…ônan "wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam tńß…ô ¶on*u…ôror", i ajawaj nipaŇčaŇčan u bu ¶ud a wawa ¶i wi-r~…ĺj…ôn "wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam tńß…ô bastard" u saajawaj nu now-man iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan ńßuŇčti, ¶iniza makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikuwan tu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan kapatajan pańß…ôz…ôk. :wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam…ô i***:guir~…ĺr~…ĺaum…ô i***:wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam i****************), . sa ni wi- ¶in nu miar~…ĺawaj a ir~…ĺu ¶ ni r~…ĺow-r~…ĺow, makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺa ba-kow now-man-ti-kow- ¶j…ô ¶i-sjaw-mu * s…ô "guir~…ĺr~…ĺaum…ô ii". wi-r~…ĺj…ôn u tańßazikuz ¶ajaj ka sia ¶awaaj now-man-ti-kow- ¶j…ô r~…ĺow-p…ô-*-s…ô atu sasumidaŇč ¶i aj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺj…ô-wa a wawa. wi-r~…ĺj…ôn ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj mat…ôn…ôs ku pisai ¶ar~…ĺaŇč patiz…ôŇč tu nu uzipaj a kasituŇčus, katukuńß tu **** a mińß ¶aan, tan…ôkt…ôk tu ¶iniza i now-man-ti amikuwan,**** a mińß ¶aan, wi-r~…ĺj…ôn mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ mar~…ĺa uńßuŇčti nu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan. (guir~…ĺr~…ĺaum…ô ii). . ¶iniza tu ¶a ¶a nu sakaput a ńßitaj now-man tad…ômaw, pu-r~…ĺj…ô-ta-ni tad…ômaw, bow-r~…ĺan-maŇč tad…ômaw nu binawr~…ĺan a nisakaputan nu ba-r~…ĺan-si masakaputaj a ńßitaj
